center.name: 湄公河
center.summary: 湄公河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mekong wagtail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Mekong wagtail is found in the Mekong valley of Cambodia and Laos, and is a non-breeding visitor to Thailand and Vietnam

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Mekong wagtail is found in the Mekong valley of Cambodia and Laos, and is a non-breeding visitor to Thailand and Vietnam
